data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for read-state tracking of in-app style notifications.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement for read-state tracking for in-app style notifications. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or data related to in-app notifications, nor does it confirm that such tracking is implemented or functioning. Therefore, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of read-state tracking for in-app style notifications.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the read-state tracking for in-app notifications.
